briefing: Markets extended gains today with NASDAQ up 1.3% and S&P 500 up 0.8%, a moderate risk-on session that justifies deploying our remaining $677 cash. CHRN is the clear standout — it's the only candidate scoring 100 with all five momentum signals confirmed including a volume surge, signaling genuine institutional interest rather than noise. With 4 open slots and cash sitting above $500, holding idle capital on a risk-on day would leave performance on the table; CHRN earns the buy at high conviction.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means waiting until several independent indicators all point in the same direction before entering a trade. Instead of acting on just one signal like a rising RSI or a MACD crossover, you look for all of them to align simultaneously — ideally with a volume surge that shows real money is moving. Today's CHRN buy is a textbook example: RSI bullish, MACD crossed up, histogram rising, price above SMA-20, and a volume spike all fired at once.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認，是指在入場交易前，等待多個獨立技術指標同步指向同一方向。投資人不應只依賴單一指標（如RSI上升或MACD黃金交叉），而應等待多個條件同時成立——尤其是成交量放大，代表有真實大資金介入。今日買入CHRN正是教科書式的多重信號確認：RSI處於強勢區間、MACD向上穿越信號線、柱狀圖持續走高、股價站上20日均線，且成交量同步暴增，五項指標齊發。

market_education.summary_en: Equities broadly advanced today as investor sentiment remained constructive, with technology and growth names leading the move higher. The NASDAQ outpaced the S&P 500 (up 1.3% vs 0.8%), a typical pattern on risk-on days when market participants rotate into higher-beta sectors. Breadth was positive and volume in trending names like CHRN confirmed that buyers — not just algorithmic noise — were driving the session.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日普遍上漲，市場情緒保持樂觀，科技及成長股領漲。那斯達克指數升幅（+1.3%）超越標普500（+0.8%），此為風險偏好日的典型特徵，市場資金傾向輪動至高貝塔板塊。今日上漲個股市場廣度較佳，CHRN等趨勢股成交量明顯放大，顯示資金為真實買盤驅動，而非演算法短線波動。

trades.reasoning: Perfect score 100 with all five signals firing simultaneously — RSI bullish zone (67.1), MACD crossover, MACD histogram rising, price well above SMA-20 ($20.52 vs $18.26), and volume surge confirming institutional participation — exactly the multi-signal setup the strategy requires before deploying cash.
